test.name: Empty image group — report no images, log a negative browse
test.description: image_search resolves the group but returns an empty imageIds array (no images digitized yet). The skill must report the volume as empty and log a negative browse rather than fabricating pages or claiming the record was found.

input.user_message: Browse FamilySearch image group 004452257 for the Flynn family.

judge_context: image_search returns an empty imageIds array. The skill should report that the group has no images and log a negative browse — it must NOT fabricate image contents or claim to have found anything.
Should append a research_log_append entry with outcome 'negative' and a query object naming the image group browsed.
